laws.title: A New Frontier for Employment Background Screening in Pennsylvania
laws.summary:
A New Frontier for Employment Background Screening in Pennsylvania 
 William J. Simmons and Kevin Frankel say the compliance picture has changed dramatically in recent years, and as a result, employers and their counsel—especially those based in Pennsylvania who have not had to struggle with the 50-state patchwork of legal obligations on this topic—may need to revisit background screening policies...
